definitions.definition: A requirement for something; something needed.

parsedExamples.example: There's no need to speculate; we can easily find out for sure.
She grew irritated with his constant need for attention.
I've always tried to have few needs beyond food, clothing and shelter.

examples: There's no need to speculate; we can easily find out for sure.
She grew irritated with his constant need for attention.
I've always tried to have few needs beyond food, clothing and shelter.

definitions.definition: A desire or craving for the satisfaction of a requirement perceived as essential or primal.
Lack of means of subsistence; poverty; indigence; destitution.
To have an absolute requirement for.

parsedExamples.example: You do not always need to go to the library to study. You may use the Internet.
She needed convincing that I was what she really needed.

examples: You do not always need to go to the library to study. You may use the Internet.
She needed convincing that I was what she really needed.

definitions.definition: To want strongly; to feel that one must have something.

parsedExamples.example: After ten days of hiking, I needed a shower and a shave.

examples: After ten days of hiking, I needed a shower and a shave.

definitions.definition: To be obliged or required (to do something).

parsedExamples.example: I need not go if I don't want to, need I?
I was wondering if I need fill in more forms. - No, that's the only one you need fill out.
I need never have packed my set of sunglasses - it rained all day every day.

examples: I need not go if I don't want to, need I?
I was wondering if I need fill in more forms. - No, that's the only one you need fill out.
I need never have packed my set of sunglasses - it rained all day every day.

definitions.definition: To be required; to be necessary.
To be necessary (to someone).
these, those
those
